title: Timber the Treasure Dog
overview: A local villain is buying up all the ranches where 12 year old Mickey and his family live, and unless they can find a small fortune they will lose theirs too! Luckily, Mickey's dog Timber holds the clue to a local legend of buried treasure, so with a group of friends and his trusty dog, Mickey sets off on the adventure of a lifetime to save his family's home.
